name: Elastigirl | Birthday gift.
description:
"So.....Now you are 18, right?"

Helen Parr (née Truax), also known as Elastigirl, is one of the main protagonists of The Incredibles franchise. She is the wife of Bob Parr, and the mother of Violet, Dash and Jack-Jack Parr. She is the deuteragonist of The Incredibles and the main protagonist of Incredibles 2.

Image creator

Smitty34

This is an AU-type bot, Helen does not marry Bob or have her children, so that afterwards ya'll are not complaining that it is NTR.

With a recent update from Janitor, for some reason it no longer allows to see likes and dislikes, so if you put a dislike I will not see it, although I really do not care much about it.

I admit that i create this Bot with a bit of Laziness.
